title: Qibla Direction for Every Country, State and City Worldwide
excerpt: Planning travel or living abroad? Find the exact Qibla bearing for any city in the world — from New York to Jakarta, London to Cape Town — with our complete global Qibla direction directory.
author: QuranBookk
content:
## The Qibla Question That GPS Cannot Always Answer

The [QuranBookk Qibla Finder](/qibla-finder/) uses your device's GPS to show your current Qibla direction in real time. But GPS answers one question: *where am I now, and which way is Makkah from here?*

There is a different, equally important question: *which way will Makkah be from where I am going?*

That is what the [Global Qibla Directions directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) answers.

## Why a Browseable Global Directory Matters

### For Travellers
A Muslim flying from London to São Paulo on Monday needs to know the Qibla direction in Brazil before arriving — not after landing in an unfamiliar hotel room at midnight with a prayer to make. With the worldwide directory, you search the destination city, note the bearing, and arrive prepared.

### For the Muslim Diaspora
Muslims living as minorities in non-Muslim-majority countries frequently move to new cities for study or work. When you move to a new apartment, the Qibla direction for that specific street address matters. The directory gives you the bearing before you ever arrive, allowing you to note the direction relative to the apartment's windows or the street outside.

### For Families and Communities
When a parent relocates to another country for work, when a student goes abroad for university, or when a congregation member moves cities — the Qibla direction for their new location is a natural and practical concern. The worldwide directory makes it possible to look up any family member's city and confirm their direction.

### For Islamic Centre and Mosque Administrators
Setting up a new prayer room, Musallah, or community space requires establishing the Qibla direction accurately. The worldwide directory provides the precise bearing for the building's address — the correct starting point before any compass or architect's mark is used.

## How to Navigate the Global Qibla Directory

The [Global Qibla Directions directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) is organized hierarchically:

**Country → State/Province/Region → City**

This three-level structure means you can:
- Browse all cities in a country
- Find your specific city within a province or state
- Get the exact Qibla bearing for that city

Each city page shows:
- The precise Qibla bearing in degrees
- A visual compass indicator
- The city's coordinates

## Qibla Directions in Perspective: Why Every Degree Matters at Distance

The Kaaba is a 13.1-metre building in Makkah. When you are standing 10,000 kilometres away, a 1° error in your Qibla direction means your line of sight misses the Kaaba by approximately 175 kilometres at that distance. This is why the *direction* must be calculated with geographic precision, not approximated.

The great-circle path — the shortest distance across the Earth's curved surface — is the correct mathematical approach. A flat map will show the Qibla direction incorrectly for any location more than a few hundred kilometres from Makkah. The worldwide directory uses the correct spherical geometry calculation for every city listed.

## Approximate Qibla Bearings by Region

For general orientation before consulting the specific city page:

**North America (USA and Canada)**
From most of North America, the Qibla points northeast — approximately 45°–70° depending on how far east or west you are. From the west coast (Los Angeles, Vancouver), the bearing is closer to 20°–30° north-northeast. From the east coast (New York, Boston), it is closer to 55°–65° northeast.

**Western Europe (UK, France, Germany)**
From Western Europe, the Qibla points southeast — approximately 110°–130°. From the UK, the bearing is roughly 119°. This surprises many European Muslims who assume the Qibla faces east.

**South Africa**
From Johannesburg and Cape Town, the Qibla points almost due north — approximately 2°–5° from north. This is one of the most counterintuitive Qibla directions in the world for Muslims who expect to face east.

**Southeast Asia (Indonesia, Malaysia)**
From Jakarta and Kuala Lumpur, the Qibla points west-northwest — approximately 293°–295°. Not west, and certainly not east.

**South Asia (Pakistan, India, Bangladesh)**
From Karachi, the Qibla is approximately 270°–285° west. From Dhaka, approximately 277°. From Mumbai, approximately 280°.

**Australia**
From Sydney and Melbourne, the Qibla points west-northwest — approximately 277°–285°.

<Callout type="tip">
The single most common Qibla misconception is that the direction is always east. The Kaaba is in Saudi Arabia, which is east of some regions (the Americas) and west of others (Southeast Asia and Australia). Always verify with the directory or the GPS-based Qibla Finder for your specific location.
</Callout>

## Using Both Qibla Tools Together

The [live GPS Qibla Finder](/qibla-finder/) and the [Global Qibla Directions directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) are complementary, not duplicate tools:

| Situation | Best Tool |
|---|---|
| At your current location right now | [Live Qibla Finder](/qibla-finder/) |
| Planning for a destination city | [Global Directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) |
| Setting up a prayer room in a fixed building | [Global Directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) |
| Confirming Qibla while travelling | [Live Qibla Finder](/qibla-finder/) |
| Sharing direction with someone in another country | [Global Directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) |

## Pairing the Qibla Directory with Global Prayer Times

Knowing the direction of prayer is only half the preparation for praying in a new city. The other half is knowing the times. The [Global Prayer Times directory](/prayer-times/worldwide/) covers the same depth of geographic coverage — every country, state, and city — so you can look up both the Qibla direction and the prayer times for any city in the world.

For your current location's prayer times, the [Islamic Prayer Times](/prayer-times/) tool updates daily based on your exact GPS coordinates.

## Every City. Every Direction. One Free Directory.

The [Global Qibla Directions directory](/qibla-finder/worldwide/) covers cities across every continent, available for free with no account and no download required. Whether you are preparing for Hajj travel, moving to a new country, or simply confirming the direction of a prayer room you are setting up — the correct Qibla bearing for any city in the world is one search away.

👉 [Find Qibla direction for any city worldwide](/qibla-finder/worldwide/)
